root.sql:
SELECT sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name( sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no ) as memname ,
-- ก่อนแก้ ( select short_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where bank_id = sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_bank_id ) as pre_bank_id_name , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_bank_id , pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as pre_bank_acc_no , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_paid_loan , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_paid_dividen , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_share_withdraw , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_atm_lon , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_atm_dep , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_paid_agent , sc_mem_edit_bank.pre_paid_salary ,
-- หลังแก้ ( select short_name from sc_acc_m_ucf_bank where bank_id = sc_mem_edit_bank.bank_id ) as bank_id_name , sc_mem_edit_bank.bank_id , pka_com_function.fp_form(sc_mem_edit_bank.bank_acc_no,'XXX-X-XXXXX-X') as bank_acc_no, sc_mem_edit_bank.paid_loan , sc_mem_edit_bank.paid_dividen , sc_mem_edit_bank.share_withdraw , sc_mem_edit_bank.atm_lon , sc_mem_edit_bank.atm_dep , sc_mem_edit_bank.paid_agent , sc_mem_edit_bank.paid_salary ,
sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_id , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy hh24:mi:ss') as entry_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_date , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as entry_date_tdate , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(sysdate , 'dd/mm/yyyy') as sysdate_tdate
FROM sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group, sc_mem_edit_bank
WHERE 1=1 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_edit_bank.membership_no and to_date(sc_mem_edit_bank.entry_date) between '!entry_date_1!' and '!entry_date_2!'
/*WHERE*/
order by entry_date_tdate , sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no
